feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Assessment of PLATO Science Performance
entry.content:
Authors: J Cabrera, H Rauer, R Samadi, V Nascimbeni... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: ... Since the uncertainty in the occurrence rate of planets in the habitable zone is high, we do a sensitivity study and generate simulations where no terrestrial planet in the habitable zone occurs (following strictly the reported occurrence rates) but we ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Impact of brewer's spent grain (BSG) and bio-transformed BSG biscuits on metabolic and gut health in adults with metabolic impairments: a randomized controlled trial

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: Y Xu, ZN Leong, Y Huang, Z Ma, GCT Chan, JE Kim - European Journal of Nutrition, 2026

Abstract: ... its prebiotic effects, as the dietary fiber in BSG can be fermented by gut microbiota, particularly bifidobacteria and lactobacilli, and consequently producing SCFAs [17, 18]. Moreover, recent studies have also explored the potential prebiotic ... and ...

entry.title: The Impacts of Ready-To-Eat-Cereals and Cereal Fibers on Gut Health, Body Weight, and Cardiometabolic Health

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: KB Comerford - Frontiers in Nutrition

Abstract: Ready-to-eat breakfast cereals are a major source of dietary fiber, and their intake is associated with better diet quality and reduced incidence of chronic disease. However, dietary fiber intake remains significantly lower than recommended levels ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: NM Aliman

entry.content:

Abstract: In Global Ecology, eminent science writer Colin Tudge offers an authoritative overview of ecological science, one that encompasses the many diverse terrains, climates and habitats of our planet while emphasizing the global unity of the Earth's ...

entry.title: From Chemistry to Life: The Mathematics of Inevitable Biology

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: MW Vick - Scale Geometry (self-published), 2026

Abstract: ... The paper accurately summarizes established laboratory evidence for abiogenesis . Its central claim, that life's emergence from chemistry is thermodynamically and statistically inevitable, is not established by the evidence ...

entry.title: Natural Panspermia to Earth: Quantitative Limits on Donor Classes, Transport, Survival, and Establishment

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: SG Turyshev - arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.03916, 2026

Abstract: ... Our purpose here is therefore not to rehearse panspermia as a general idea, but to answer a narrower and more decisive Earth-specific question... Panspermia is often discussed as though it were a single proposition. It is not. At minimum one ...

Abstract: ... This review critically evaluates the scientific basis for probiotic, prebiotic , synbiotic, and postbiotic potentials in fermented citrus products. ... Fermented citrus shows promise primarily as a source of prebiotic substrates and fermentation‐derived ...

entry.title: Protein coacervation-driven active forces power protocell dynamics

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Jia, H Sun, W Zhang, X Ning, S Mann - Nature Communications, 2026

Abstract: Protein coacervates formed by liquid-liquid phase separation are emerging as active force generators, independent of ATP-driven motors. Nevertheless, the coordination and force scaling of protein coacervates remain largely unexplored. Here, we ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life, Reviewer, too: Physical Biology

entry.title: Interaction with the Environment via Random Matrices and the Emergence of Classical Field Theory
entry.content:
Authors: AA Kryukov -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.03778, 2026

Abstract: It was recently shown that Newtonian dynamics of macroscopic particles can be derived from unitary Schr\"odinger evolution under an assumption on the system-environment interaction, namely that the interaction Hamiltonian effectively exhibits a random-matrix ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: CASCADE: A Cascading Architecture for Social Coordination with Controllable Emergence at Low Cost
entry.content:
Authors: Y Xu -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.03091, 2026

Abstract: Creating scalable and believable game societies requires balancing authorial control with computational cost. Existing scripted NPC systems scale efficiently but are often rigid, whereas fully LLM-driven agents can produce richer social behavior ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Prediction of Magnetic Flux Evolution During Solar Active Region Emergence using Long Short-Term Memory Networks
entry.content:
Authors: E Dogan, S Kasapis, S Patil, J Tirona, J Stefan... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: ... We develop machine learning models capable of predicting the evolution of magnetic flux during AR emergence using 1D time series of the ... To define magnetic flux emergence , we adopt an emergence criterion similar to that of Kasapis et al. (2025) ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)
